file_name: Yang et al. - 2023 - Mapping port wine stain in vivo by optical coherence tomography angiography and multi-metric charact.json

did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper did not use AI, machine learning, or deep learning. It employed traditional statistical methods including Student's t-test, Linear Discriminant Analysis (LDA), and t-Distributed Stochastic Neighbor Embedding (t-SNE) for dimensionality reduction and classification. These are conventional statistical and dimensionality reduction techniques, not AI/ML models in the context of modern computational diagnostics.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
